title: Blaze N Caves
description: This modpack is an amazing experience of the main reason this pack is here, the Blaze And Caves Data Pack!
body:
DOWNLOAD MODPACK AND THEN GO TO THIS ---> [STEP BY STEP SETUP GUIDE](https://drive.google.com/drive/u/0/folders/1n3efLMjPOABuB3O5olV_gOuWFuK7xwyk)
## 
NO FULL GUARANTEE THAT YOUR WORLD COULD GET CORRUPTED:
It will most likely tell you that Experimental Features needs to be enabled, which will be needed. If you are worried that your world is going to get corrupted, hit "Create Backup and Load." 

![ ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5f891ae6088691c5041caebb79057521baf3ebb8_0.webp)

When it comes to hosting servers, I always trust BisectHosting. New customers can use https://www.bisecthosting.com/JaggerGTV to save 25% on their first month of a gaming server, and their dedicated support team is available 24/7 to provide you with top-notch assistance.
